case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. MARCO ARMANDO ALVAREZ-GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ-GOMEZ, MARCO ARMANDO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
